title: POST /books endpoint for creating books
evidence: main.py:54-63 creates books with title, author, year, isbn fields

title: GET /books with author filter support
evidence: main.py:66-75 supports ?author= query parameter with LIKE matching

title: GET /books/{id} single book endpoint
evidence: main.py:78-84 retrieves single book by ID

title: PUT /books/{id} update endpoint
evidence: main.py:87-99 updates book fields with validation

title: DELETE /books/{id} delete endpoint
evidence: main.py:102-107 deletes book by ID with 404 handling

title: SQLite database storage
evidence: database.py:27-37 creates books table with SQLite

title: Input validation for required fields
evidence: main.py:23-28 validates title and author are not empty using @field_validator

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md:1-56 provides setup, run, endpoints, and test instructions

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests defined but cannot execute
evidence: test_books.py contains 12 test functions, but all fail at setup stage due to FastAPI version incompatibility
suggestion: Resolve FastAPI/Starlette version conflict to enable test execution

title: Test suite fails to initialize: FastAPI lifespan + Starlette version mismatch
evidence: pytest output: TypeError: Router.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'on_startup' at main.py:14
suggestion: Update Starlette version to >= 0.41.0 or use compatible FastAPI version

title: SQL injection vulnerability in update_book
evidence: main.py:95 uses f-string for SQL construction: f"UPDATE books SET {set_clause} WHERE id = ?" without parameterization of column names
suggestion: Use a SQL builder or validate column names against allowlist

title: Import block formatting issues
evidence: ruff check reports I001 violations in database.py:1, main.py:1, test_books.py:1 and test_books.py:18
suggestion: Run ruff check --fix to auto-sort imports

title: Outdated type annotation syntax
evidence: ruff reports UP045: use X | None instead of Optional[X] in main.py lines 20, 21, 32, 33, 34, 35, 67
suggestion: Replace Optional[T] with T | None for modern Python 3.10+ syntax

title: Invalid noqa directive
evidence: test_books.py:29 has # noqa without error codes, should specify codes like # noqa: F401
suggestion: Add error codes to noqa comment or remove if the warning is resolved
